change: you change its signature (e.g. add/alter params or return a value)

impact.why: The sole concrete implementation of the ValidatorSet.CalcProposer interface method; must match any signature change.
Calls valSet.CalcProposer(lastProposer, uint64(round)) inside the per-round proposer search; a signature change breaks this call site.
Calls c.valSet.CalcProposer(lastProposer, newView.Round.Uint64()) when starting a new consensus round; must be updated for any signature change.

notes: Small, well-bounded interface method. grep alone is sufficient here: there is exactly one interface decl (types.go:218, the seed, excluded), one implementer (default.go), and two production call sites (engine.go, core.go). The selector function field (valSet.selector) is internal to defaultSet and keeps the (proposer, round) shape, so if the new signature must thread a new value into selection it would also touch default.go selectors (calcSeed/roundRobinProposer/stickyProposer) — those are reached via the implementer, not separate interface obligations. Test-only callers in default_test.go excluded.
